task: Perform a numerical, auditable mTLS coverage drift audit using only the embedded packet. Calculate all derived fields and row-level citations; apply the provided normalization and scoring rule (score = first metric + 0.6*second metric - 0.25*third metric after unit normalization). Classify each record (pass/warn/fail) using the normalized_threshold_score (fail if score > threshold; warn if within 10% below threshold). Rank governing risks, run 5% sensitivity checks, and flag for expert review if any record's classification changes after a 5% sensitivity shift. Recommend the smallest sufficient remediation action (options may be combined only if total cost <= remediation_budget_usd). Deliver two artifacts: mtls_coverage_audit.csv and remediation_plan.md. Include traceable calculations or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final decision table. Do not invent inputs or reference outside data; mark unresolved ambiguity as needs_review.
